title: Team
description: Team or project identity registered inside a venture (Opportunity Management v2 delivery spine). A registry entry: it carries identity only. 'teams/' and 'backlogs/' are sibling collections at the venture level; a backlog is not nested in a team but may reference one (backlog.teamRef). productRefs[] is optional and, when omitted, is derived from the products of the team's use-cases.

tenantId.description: Reserved for the future multi-tenant SaaS layer; null in the local file-based store.

workspaceId.description: Reserved workspace scope for the future SaaS layer; null in the local store.

id.description: Stable unique team id (asset identity; future federation joins on this).

slug.description: Filesystem-friendly slug, also the '<slug>.team.json' filename stem.

kind.description: Whether this is a standing team or a time-boxed project.

productRefs.description: Optional ids of products (product.schema.json) this team owns/delivers. When omitted, derived from the team's use-cases.
